problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Shape. Shape memory alloy phase transition directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
